title: senecio aquifoliaceus
intro: Senecio aquifoliaceus is a plant species, also known as Woolly Groundsel, belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Senecio aquifoliaceus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been used by indigenous cultures to treat various ailments, and it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
